commands.review_summary:
The PR adds indented-code handling and code-aware cleanup to media parsing, tightens fence closing validation, changes MEDIA matching to case-sensitive, and adds parser/fence tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main only skips fenced spans and then extracts any trimmed 4-space/tab MEDIA line via the uppercase-normalized line gate. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof, and the PR branch needs source fixes for parser compatibility before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.author: jerry-xin

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main returns under-cap `toolResult.details` unchanged while transcript text redaction only touches `content`, and the PR body supplies after-fix live output showing fake secrets absent from persisted entries.

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a disable-only stderr note to the cron CLI, a cron disable/list/enable regression test, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main gives a high-confidence path: disable updates the job, default `cron list` sends `includeDisabled: false`, the service filters disabled jobs, and the disable command emits no recovery hint.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review plus exact-head check gating.

target.title: fix(cron): hint after disable about list filtering disabled jobs
target.author: kate

commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an indented-code guard and fence-closing validation to media parsing, changes MEDIA case handling, and adds media/fence parser regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main skips only fenced spans and then extracts any trimmed line whose uppercase prefix is `MEDIA:`, so blank-line-preceded 4-space or tab-indented code can be extracted. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof and the PR branch needs source fixes; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.
